name: Parmesan Cheese Cones
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese, Parmesan, mayonnaise, oregano, and garlic powder in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Shape the mixture into two cone shapes using the almonds as petals.
3. Arrange the cones on a serving board or platter.
4. Decorate with evergreen sprigs and Christmas balls.
5. Serve with fruit and crackers.
